commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get nodes -o wide 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get nodes -l node.kubernetes.io/instance-type=p5.48xlarge -o wide 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get ds -n kube-system 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -A 2>&1 | head -40'
